info.title: Onshape API - BlobElement
info.description: Create, modify, and translate blob elements.

tags.name: BlobElement
tags.description: Create, modify, and translate blob elements.

post.summary: Upload a file and create a blob element from it.
post.description: Request body parameters are multipart fields, so you must use `"Content-Type":"multipart/form-data"` in the request header.

parameters.name: did
parameters.description: The id of the document in which to perform the operation.

parameters.name: linkDocumentId
parameters.description: The id of the document through which the above document should be accessed; only applicable when accessing a version of the document. This allows a user who has access to document a to see data from document b, as long as document b has been linked to document a by a user who has permission to both.

parameters.name: wid
parameters.description: The id of the workspace in which to perform the operation.

allowFaultyParts.description: If true, and a part doesn't pass Onshape validation, it will be imported with faults.

createComposite.description: Not supported for importing into a single part studio.

encodedFilename.description: If the filename contains non-ASCII characters. Use this field to store the filename.

flattenAssemblies.description: If the file is an assembly, or contains an assembly, setting this to True will import it as a Part Studio. In this case the assembly will be flattened to a set of parts in a Part Studio. There will be duplicate parts created whenever a part is instanced more than once. If False, it will be imported as an Assembly.

importAppearances.description: Face appearances defined on models will be imported.

importMaterialDensity.description: Material density defined on models will be imported.

yAxisIsUp.description: If the file was created in a system that orients with Y Axis Up, the models would by default be brought into Onshape (a Z Axis Up system) with a flipped coordinate system. Toggle this value to reorient the axis system to match Onshape and display the model with the coordinates you expect.

useIGESImportPostProcessing.description: Try getting optimized topology from IGES model.

repointAppElementVersionRefs.description: Re-point the version references in APP elements to initial version in the new document

get.summary: Download a file from a blob element for the specified workspace/version/microversion.
get.description: See [API Guide: Model Translation](https://onshape-public.github.io/docs/api-adv/translation/) for more details.

parameters.name: did
parameters.description: The id of the document in which to perform the operation.

parameters.name: linkDocumentId
parameters.description: The id of the document through which the above document should be accessed; only applicable when accessing a version of the document. This allows a user who has access to document a to see data from document b, as long as document b has been linked to document a by a user who has permission to both.

parameters.name: wid
parameters.description: The id of the workspace in which to perform the operation.

parameters.name: eid
parameters.description: The id of the element in which to perform the operation.

parameters.name: contentDisposition
parameters.description: If "attachment", includes a Content-Disposition return header with the filename.

parameters.name: If-None-Match
parameters.description: Entity tag; an md5 checksum of the data in double quotes. If the data to download has the same checksum as this entity tag, a 304 'Not Modified' status will be returned. The entity tag is returned in the response headers as ETag.

post.summary: Update a blob element by uploading a file.
post.description: Request body parameters are multipart fields, so you must use `"Content-Type":"multipart/form-data"` in the request header.

parameters.name: did
parameters.description: The id of the document in which to perform the operation.

parameters.name: linkDocumentId
parameters.description: The id of the document through which the above document should be accessed; only applicable when accessing a version of the document. This allows a user who has access to document a to see data from document b, as long as document b has been linked to document a by a user who has permission to both.

parameters.name: wid
parameters.description: The id of the workspace in which to perform the operation.

parameters.name: eid
parameters.description: The id of the element in which to perform the operation.

parameters.name: parentChangeId
parameters.description: The id of the last change made to this application element. This can be retrieved from the response for any app element modification endpoint.

allowFaultyParts.description: If true, and a part doesn't pass Onshape validation, it will be imported with faults.

createComposite.description: Not supported for importing into a single part studio.

encodedFilename.description: If the filename contains non-ASCII characters. Use this field to store the filename.

flattenAssemblies.description: If the file is an assembly, or contains an assembly, setting this to True will import it as a Part Studio. In this case the assembly will be flattened to a set of parts in a Part Studio. There will be duplicate parts created whenever a part is instanced more than once. If False, it will be imported as an Assembly.

importAppearances.description: Face appearances defined on models will be imported.

importMaterialDensity.description: Material density defined on models will be imported.

yAxisIsUp.description: If the file was created in a system that orients with Y Axis Up, the models would by default be brought into Onshape (a Z Axis Up system) with a flipped coordinate system. Toggle this value to reorient the axis system to match Onshape and display the model with the coordinates you expect.

post.summary: Change the measurement units for the blob element.

parameters.name: did
parameters.description: The id of the document in which to perform the operation.

parameters.name: linkDocumentId
parameters.description: The id of the document through which the above document should be accessed; only applicable when accessing a version of the document. This allows a user who has access to document a to see data from document b, as long as document b has been linked to document a by a user who has permission to both.

parameters.name: wid
parameters.description: The id of the workspace in which to perform the operation.

parameters.name: eid
parameters.description: The id of the element in which to perform the operation.

post.summary: Export a blob element to another format.
post.description:
* Use `formatName` in the JSON request body to specify the export file type. Use [Translations/getAllTranslatorFormats]#/Translation/getAllTranslatorFormats) to get a list of valid export file formats. 
* Set `storeInDocument` to `false` to export to a data file. Set to `true` to export to a blob element in the same document. 
* See [API Guide: Model Translation](https://onshape-public.github.io/docs/api-adv/translation/) for more details.

parameters.name: did
parameters.description: The id of the document in which to perform the operation.

parameters.name: linkDocumentId
parameters.description: The id of the document through which the above document should be accessed; only applicable when accessing a version of the document. This allows a user who has access to document a to see data from document b, as long as document b has been linked to document a by a user who has permission to both.

parameters.name: wv
parameters.description: Indicates which of workspace (w) or version (v) id is specified below.

parameters.name: wvid
parameters.description: The id of the workspace, version in which the operation should be performed.

parameters.name: eid
parameters.description: The id of the element in which to perform the operation.

allowFaultyParts.description: If true, parts with faults are imported. If false, faulty parts are omitted.

angularTolerance.description: Determines the maximum angular deviation, between the analytical surface and its triangulation. Lower values result in a finer geometry and higher values result in coarser geometry.

annotationsFontHeightInMillimeters.description: Determines the font size in workspace units used for the MBD annotations text export

cloudObjectId.description: Folder id where to store the exported model.

cloudStorageAccountId.description: Account id to access the cloud storage.

configuration.description: URL-encoded string of configuration values (separated by `;`). See the [Configurations API Guide](https://onshape-public.github.io/docs/api-adv/configs/) for details.

destinationName.description: The name of the exported file.

distanceTolerance.description: Determines the maximum distance deviation, between the analytical surface and its triangulation. Lower values result in a finer geometry and higher values result in coarser geometry.

elementId.description: The id of the element in which to perform the operation.

elementIds.description: An array of element ids for multi-element export.

items.description: An array of element ids for multi-element export.

emailLink.description: Use `true` if a link in an email should be sent.

emailMessage.description: Message to send in the email body along with the download link.

emailSubject.description: Subject to send the email with.

emailTo.description: List of email addresses to send the email to.

items.description: List of email addresses to send the email to.

evaluateExportRule.description: Set to `true` to evaluate the export rule for the given `formatName` and to include an `exportRuleFileName` value in the response.

excludeHiddenEntities.description: Whether or not to exclude hidden parts from export.

formatName.description: The name of the file format.

fromUserId.description: Id of the user who does the export.

grouping.description: Whether parts should be exported as a group or individually in a .zip file.

ignoreExportRulesForContents.description: For multiple elements export, use `true` if export rule shouldn't be applied for all elements.

includeExportIds.description: Whether topology ids should be exported as parasolid attributes.

linkDocumentId.description: The id of the document through which the above document should be accessed; only applicable when accessing a version of the document. This allows a user who has access to document a to see data from document b, as long as document b has been linked to document a by a user who has permission to both.

linkDocumentWorkspaceId.description: The id of the workspace through which the above document should be accessed; only applicable when accessing a version of the document. This allows a user who has access to document a to see data from document b, as long as document b has been linked to document a by a user who has permission to both.

maximumChordLength.description: Determines the maximum of a triangle edge length. Lower values result in a finer geometry and higher values result in coarser geometry.

notifyUser.description: Send notification to the user client.

occurrencesToExport.description: IDs of the occurrences to retrieve. Use comma-separated IDs for multiple instances (example: occurrencesToExport=JHK,JHD).

partIds.description: IDs of the parts to retrieve. Use comma-separated IDs for multiple parts (example: partIds=JHK,JHD).

password.description: A password to protect the email with.

passwordRequired.description: Use `true` if the email should be protected with a password.

resolution.description: Determines export resolution of fine, medium, or coarse

sendCopyToMe.description: Use `true` if email copy should be sent to the user who does the export.

storeInDocument.description: Create a blob with exported file in the source document.

validForDays.description: Number of days to keep the link valid for.

versionString.description: Parasolid version number as string. Use '0' for the latest.

exportRuleFileName.description: The file name after evaluating a rule for the given `formatName`. `NULL` if `evaluateExportRule=false` or if the export rule is not found.

href.description: URI to fetch complete information of the resource.

viewRef.description: URI to visualize the resource in a webclient if applicable.

BTPartsExportFilter-4308.description: Skip mesh/curve foreign data creation in individual parts export

GBTPreProcessParasolidOption.description: Original geometry processing mode to improve results of translation to STEP.
